blocks.content: Time intervals (used for mute timings and active time intervals) are configured in the Alerting section. In this milestone you navigate to the Time intervals page.
To navigate to Time intervals, complete the following steps:
In Grafana Cloud, navigate to **Alerts & IRM > Alerting > Notification configuration > Time intervals** from the main menu.

You should see the Time intervals page with a table of existing intervals (or an empty state if none are defined yet).

In the next milestone, you create a new time interval with a recurring schedule.
